items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 24 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent Toolkit Brings Accelerated AI to Life Sciences Researchers in Claude Science」、「Open Models, Closed Environments: Palantir Brings Secure AI to US Agencies With NVIDIA Nemotron」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
actionItems: 评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent Toolkit Brings Accelerated AI to Life Sciences Researchers in Claude Science
评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：Open Models, Closed Environments: Palantir Brings Secure AI to US Agencies With NVIDIA Nemotron
评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：AI Infrastructure

items.title: NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent Toolkit Brings Accelerated AI to Life Sciences Researchers in Claude Science
items.summary: 来自NVIDIA Blog：Generative AI（网页）的这条内容命中 Agent / Harness / 工具调用方向，可补充团队 AI Native 和自动化研发闭环的外部信号。
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。
